div.p: The First Committee of the United Nations General Assembly met on January 12 from 3 to 5:50 p. m.; for the record, see United Nations document A/C.1/SR.423. At the meeting, the Israeli Delegate introduced a draft resolution (A/C.1/647) under the terms of which the First Committee would approve the principles set forth in the Supplementary Report of the Cease-Fire Group (A/C.1/645) and request the Secretary-General to submit them to Peking for the observations of the People’s Republic of China as soon as possible. No vote was taken on the draft resolution at this meeting.
